title: ICAI Declares CA Final Examination January 2026 Results on March 1, 2026!
content:
# ICAI Declares CA Final Examination January 2026 Results on March 1, 2026!

Ek important update hai for all CA Final aspirants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Chartered Accountants Final Examination, January 2026 session ke results declare kar diye hain. Candidates inka बेसब्री se intezaar kar rahe the.

The results were announced on March 1, 2026, marking a significant milestone for thousands of students.

*   **Result Declaration Date:** March 1, 2026
*   **How to Check:** Candidates can check their scorecards, merit list, and All India Ranks by logging in on the official ICAI results website. You will need your Registration Number and Roll Number to access your result.
*   **Toppers:** This session saw Diksha Goyal secure the All India Rank (AIR) 1 with an impressive 81% (486 marks out of 600). Anirudh Garg secured AIR 2, while Rishabh Jain and Dhruv Dembla jointly secured AIR 3.
*   **Pass Percentage:**
    *   Group I: 21.03%
    *   Group II: 9.76%
    *   Both Groups: 10.97%

Newly qualified Chartered Accountants ko bahut bahut badhai!

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://icai.nic.in/caresult)

*Published on: 2 March 2026*
